Careers
Careers

We're always on the lookout for amazing people to join our team

Why work at FreshCo?
Great Benefits

We offer great training and support, accommodating and flexible work schedules, and endless growth opportunities.

Employee Discounts

We offer a 10% employee discount so you can save on groceries!

Friendly Environment

You'll get to work in an inclusive environment and make a difference in the community we serve. 

Retail

You'll keep our shelves stocked and checkout lines moving. If you love food and helping customers, we would love for you to be our new FreshCo teammate.

See Available Roles
Warehouse

As demand in our locations increases, we'll need more professionals to help us safely move the products that our customers rely on from our warehouses to our stores.

See Available Roles
Head Office

This is the place to be for food lovers. We're always looking for people to work in our corporate head office. Be part of our team serving millions of everyday Canadians across the country!

See Available Roles
